message: chore(make): avoid rebuild in gog target

files.patch:
@@ -24,11 +24,7 @@ build:
 	@go build -ldflags "$(LDFLAGS)" -o $(BIN) $(CMD)
 
 gog: build
-	@mkdir -p $(BIN_DIR)
-	@tmp_cache=$$(mktemp -d -t gogcli-gocache.XXXXXX); \
-	trap 'rm -rf "$$tmp_cache"' EXIT; \
-	GOCACHE="$$tmp_cache" go build -ldflags "$(LDFLAGS)" -o $(BIN) $(CMD); \
-	$(BIN) $(ARGS)
+	@$(BIN) $(ARGS)
 
 gogcli: gog
